title: Squirrel Removal in Lenox Hill, Manhattan | $900 – $2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Lenox Hill, Manhattan. Expert wildlife control for homes and buildings. Same-day service available. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Squirrels invading your Lenox Hill property can cause serious damage to attics, wiring, and insulation. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane and effective squirrel removal services throughout Lenox Hill, from the luxury residences near Park Avenue to the historic brownstones lining the tree-lined streets. Our certified wildlife technicians safely remove squirrels and prevent future infestations with comprehensive exclusion solutions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Lenox Hill residents and property managers for years with fast, reliable squirrel removal services tailored to Manhattan's unique building structures. Our team understands the specific challenges of wildlife control in high-rise buildings, co-ops, and historic properties, delivering discreet, effective solutions with minimal disruption to your daily life.
localContext: Lenox Hill's proximity to Central Park and abundance of mature trees make it particularly susceptible to squirrel activity, especially in pre-war buildings and townhouses along streets like East 70th and Lexington Avenue. The neighborhood's mix of luxury residences, medical facilities near Lenox Hill Hospital, and commercial spaces requires experienced professionals who understand both residential and institutional pest control needs.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Lenox Hill?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Lenox Hill typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and the size of your property. This includes humane trapping, removal, exclusion work to seal entry points, and cleanup of contaminated insulation if needed.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a squirrel problem in Lenox Hill?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Lenox Hill and surrounding Manhattan neighborhoods. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an inspection at your convenience and begin the removal process immediately to prevent further damage to your property.

faqs.question: Are squirrels dangerous to my Lenox Hill home or apartment?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage by chewing through electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), tearing up insulation, gnawing on wood structures, and leaving droppings that contaminate attic spaces. They can also be quite noisy, especially during early morning hours, and may carry parasites like fleas and ticks.

faqs.question: Do you use humane squirrel removal methods?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, ethical trapping and exclusion methods that comply with New York City wildlife regulations. We safely capture and relocate squirrels, then seal all entry points to prevent re-entry, ensuring a permanent solution without harm to the animals.
